name: multi-clawd
description: Register additional Claude Code logins (Max/Pro accounts) as first-class OpenClaw CLI backends for cross-account failover, keeping the full skills/MCP harness on every account.

pool.description: Pooled backend: one backend id fronting several accounts. Every launch runs on the first pooled account that is not nearly maxed out (from each account's rate_limit_event health state), so a near-limit home account hands over BEFORE it hard-fails. Route your chain at <pool.id>/<model> to get proactive same-model account failover.

id.description: Backend id / provider prefix for the pool. Default "clawd".

accounts.description: Account ids (from accounts[]) in preference order; the first is the home account and reclaims the pool when its usage window resets.

utilizationThreshold.description: Hand over when any rate-limit window's utilization reaches this fraction. Default 0.85.

staleAfterMs.description: Ignore health data older than this. Default 21600000 (6h).

minDwellMs.description: After rotating away from home, stay on the rotated-to account at least this long before returning home (anti-flap hysteresis; health always overrides). Default 600000 (10min).

models.description: Extra model ids to expose on the pool backend.

defaultModel.description: Model id used for live probes. Defaults to claude-fable-5.

accounts.description: Additional Claude accounts to register as CLI backends. Each becomes a provider prefix usable in model refs and fallback chains, e.g. claw2/claude-fable-5.

id.description: Backend id / provider prefix, e.g. 'claw2'. Must be unique and not collide with the bundled 'claude-cli'.

native.description: Use the machine's native Claude login (default config dir; OS keychain on macOS). Sets neither CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR nor a token. Use this to include the main account in the rotation pool.

configDir.description: Isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR for this login (keeps its sessions separate from the native login and other accounts).

oauthTokenFile.description: Path to a file (0600) containing this account's Claude Code setup-token. Read at launch and passed as CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN. Mutually exclusive with oauthTokenRef.

oauthTokenRef.description: Secret reference resolving to this account's Claude Code setup-token via the gateway's configured secret providers — same shape as every other secret in openclaw.json, e.g. {"source":"exec","provider":"onepassword","id":"op://Vault/Item/field"}. Preferred over oauthTokenFile (no plaintext on disk). Resolution failures degrade the account (auth fails, chain steps) rather than crashing the launch.

source.description: Secret source kind: env | file | exec.

id.description: Provider-scoped secret id, e.g. an op:// reference.

models.description: Extra model ids to expose for this account beyond the mirrored claude-cli catalog (e.g. a brand-new model OpenClaw doesn't list yet). Unknown modern claude-* ids also resolve on demand without being listed here.

defaultModel.description: Model id used for live probes (openclaw models status). Defaults to claude-fable-5.
